analysis.circle_of_fifths_analog: Is phyllotaxis a depth-3 traversal? Answer: YES. Spiral phyllotaxis = exp(2πinϕ) is EML-3 oscillation. The golden angle is the 'most irrational' angle — it maximizes packing = maximizes destructive interference between spirals. This is the same equal-weight cancellation structure as the critical line!
